content.body: Why does the PR preview fail for https://github.com/whatwg/fullscreen/pull/232 ? I don't get the build error when building locally (and I added "removing steps" to the link-defaults)
https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12395 also fails, but with some sort of internal error
oh it succeeds now, seems intermittent

RE language tags in the spellcheck dictionary proposal https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12388. It was discussed, https://github.com/Igalia/explainers/issues/44, but we dropped it from the proposal and it's not in the explainer. TAG feedback did not include it as far as I know.
